requirement: Organization demonstrates commitment to integrity and ethical values
Board of directors demonstrates independence and exercises oversight
Organization internally communicates information to support functioning of internal control
verification_method: Run GV workflow to verify constitution communication

requirement: Organization specifies objectives with sufficient clarity to enable identification of risks
verification_method: Review PRD risk sections and architecture decisions

requirement: Organization identifies and analyzes risks to achievement of objectives
verification_method: Run IR workflow and review risk findings

requirement: Organization selects and develops monitoring activities
verification_method: Review trace artifacts and retrospective outputs

requirement: Organization selects and develops control activities that mitigate risks
verification_method: Review quality gate configurations and CR output

requirement: Organization implements logical access security over protected information assets
verification_method: Review security policy for access control requirements

requirement: Organization manages credentials for infrastructure and software
Organization identifies and assesses changes that could impact internal controls
Organization manages the inventory of information assets
Organization assesses and manages risks associated with vendors and partners
verification_method: Review approved technologies and vendor policies
